ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the region to which the country belongs */,
  "population" TEXT /* Population of the country */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the country in square kilometers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_data" (
  "sales_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales record */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country associated with the sales */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the sales data */,
  "tons_sold" INTEGER /* Amount of wheat sold in tons */,
  "commodity_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the commodity */,
  "price_per_ton" REAL /* Price of wheat per ton in the given year */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the sales data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sales_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_data_commodity_id FOREIGN KEY ("commodity_id") REFERENCES commodities ("commodity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_data_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "annual_sales_summary" (
  "summary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each summary record */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the summary */,
  "total_tons_sold" INTEGER /* Total tons of wheat sold globally in that year */,
  "commodity_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the commodity */,
  "average_price_per_ton" REAL /* Average price of wheat per ton globally in that year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("summary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annual_sales_summary_commodity_id FOREIGN KEY ("commodity_id") REFERENCES commodities ("commodity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annual_sales_summary_year FOREIGN KEY ("year") REFERENCES sales_data ("year")
)

CREATE TABLE "commodities" (
  "commodity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each commodity */,
  "commodity_name" TEXT /* Name of the commodity */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the commodity */,
  "unit_of_measure" TEXT /* Unit of measure for the commodity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("commodity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis report */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the report */,
  "report" TEXT /* Text content of the market analysis */,
  "commodity_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the commodity being analyzed */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country associated with the analysis */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the analysis report */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the key findings */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_analysis_commodity_id FOREIGN KEY ("commodity_id") REFERENCES commodities ("commodity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_analysis_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or division the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time */,
  "status" TEXT /* User status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the sales data */,
  "sales_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sales record being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client accessing the data */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "annual_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend record */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the trend data */,
  "trend_description" TEXT /* Description of the trend observed during the year */,
  "commodity_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the commodity */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the trend data */,
  "impact" TEXT /* Impact of the trend on the market */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exports" (
  "export_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each export record */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country exporting the wheat */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the export data */,
  "export_tons" INTEGER /* Amount of wheat exported in tons */,
  "commodity_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the commodity */,
  "destination_country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the destination country */,
  "price_per_ton" REAL /* Price of wheat per ton in the given year */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the export data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("export_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exports_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exports_destination_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("destination_country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exports_commodity_id FOREIGN KEY ("commodity_id") REFERENCES commodities ("commodity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "imports" (
  "import_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each import record */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country importing the wheat */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the import data */,
  "import_tons" INTEGER /* Amount of wheat imported in tons */,
  "commodity_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the commodity */,
  "source_country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the source country */,
  "price_per_ton" REAL /* Price of wheat per ton in the given year */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the import data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("import_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_imports_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_imports_commodity_id FOREIGN KEY ("commodity_id") REFERENCES commodities ("commodity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_imports_source_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "price_data" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price record */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the price data */,
  "price_per_ton" REAL /* Price of wheat per ton */,
  "commodity_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the commodity */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the price data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_price_data_year FOREIGN KEY ("year") REFERENCES sales_data ("year"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_price_data_commodity_id FOREIGN KEY ("commodity_id") REFERENCES commodities ("commodity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "region_analysis" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "total_sales" INTEGER /* Total sales of wheat in tons for the region */,
  "commodity_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the commodity */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_region_analysis_commodity_id FOREIGN KEY ("commodity_id") REFERENCES commodities ("commodity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasonal_sales" (
  "seasonal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each seasonal record */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the seasonal sales data */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season (e.g., Summer, Winter) */,
  "tons_sold" INTEGER /* Amount of wheat sold in tons during that season */,
  "commodity_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the commodity */,
  "price_per_ton" REAL /* Price of wheat per ton in the given season */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the seasonal sales data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("seasonal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_seasonal_sales_commodity_id FOREIGN KEY ("commodity_id") REFERENCES commodities ("commodity_id")
)
